name: Chicken-Chili Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cook onions and garlic in oil until soft.
3. Turn off the heat and mix in chicken, corn, olives, chilies, and red pepper flakes.
4. Remove the tops from bell peppers and slice them lengthwise, removing seeds and membranes.
5. Arrange the sliced bell peppers around the edge of the casserole dish.
6. Add cheese to the chicken mixture and stir immediately.
7. Bake for 45 minutes.
